chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S- 80 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. HERAING OF CASE 1.For hearing of CMA 4749/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 22-05-2023 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed A. Puno, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press instant Crl. Transfer Application, which stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
